form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last on April 12 over 520m at this track behind Bentley Kristoff beaten 14 lengths (30.72) in a Grade 4/5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.79) when seventh over 520m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from six starts. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Q Lakeside to win by 0.8 lengths in 25.32, beating Mojo Bone. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 7 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Sheriff beaten 11 lengths (25.85). Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Effortless winner to post a big 9 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Q Lakeside, recording a powerful 25.18 over the 457m journey. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.
